name: Show multiple results on task list
precondition: User is logged in with access to the Tasks table/list; at least one task in the list has more than one sample result.
objective: Validate that tasks with multiple sample results display "X Results Available" and that the link opens the Edit Tasks modal.

steps.expectedResult: Tasks table is displayed with the Results column visible.

steps.step: Locate a task that has more than one sample result.
steps.expectedResult: Results column displays "3 Results Available", matching the number of sample results for the task.

steps.step: Click "3 Results Available" in the Results column.
steps.expectedResult: Edit Tasks modal opens for the selected task.
